title: ALTER TABLE RENAME fails for triggers that use the table name with a different case
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE TestTable (id UInt32, name String, value Float64 DEFAULT 0.0);
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW TestTrigger TO TestTable AS SELECT id, name, value + 1 AS value FROM TestTable WHERE id IS NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE TestTable RENAME TO testtable;
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE RENAME with case-sensitive trigger names
